conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a story about a detective who can hear people's thoughts for only 10 seconds at a time.
org_constraint: The story must conclude with the phrase "and the truth was finally revealed."
new_constraint: The keyword "reveal" cannot appear in the passive voice.
instruction: Write a story about a detective who can hear people's thoughts for only 10 seconds at a time. The story must conclude with the phrase "and the truth was finally revealed." The keyword "reveal" cannot appear in the passive voice.

        Elias Thorne adjusted his collar. The silence in the interrogation room was heavy. He knew the rules. Ten seconds. That was all he could hear.
        The suspect sat opposite him. A man named Kael.
        Elias focused. He pushed his mind into the room.
        He heard a whisper. A memory of a gun.
        The thought faded.
        Elias asked again.
        Kael looked nervous.
        Elias heard the lie.
        He pushed deeper.
        He heard the plan.
        The thought ended.
        Elias stood up.
        He walked to the window.
        He saw the police outside.
        He knew the time was up.
        He turned back.
        He spoke to Kael.
        "You are the killer."
        Kael froze.
        He looked at the floor.
        He admitted it.
        He said the name.
        Elias nodded.
        He closed the file.
        He walked out.
        The case was closed.
        And the truth was finally revealed.
